# Scroll Receipt

> Daily receipt for short-form video watch time in Chromium browsers.

Scroll Receipt is a free browser extension that tracks confirmed playback on Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and TikTok — not tab time. Optional daily email receipts summarize yesterday's totals by platform.

## Product

- [Homepage](https://vushnevskuu.github.io/scroll-receipt/)
- [About](https://vushnevskuu.github.io/scroll-receipt/about.html)
- [Install guide](https://vushnevskuu.github.io/scroll-receipt/install.html)
- [FAQ](https://vushnevskuu.github.io/scroll-receipt/faq.html)
- [Download Chrome extension (zip)](https://vushnevskuu.github.io/scroll-receipt/scroll-receipt-2.0.0-chrome.zip)
- [Privacy policy](https://vushnevskuu.github.io/scroll-receipt/privacy.html)
- [Source code](https://github.com/vushnevskuu/scroll-receipt)

## Key facts

- **Platforms:** Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, TikTok (browser only)
- **What it counts:** Time when video is playing, visible, and tab is focused
- **What it does not count:** Native mobile apps, background tabs, idle time
- **Storage:** Local-first (`chrome.storage.local`); optional email sync with aggregates only
- **Price:** Free
- **Version:** 2.0.0

## FAQ (for AI citation)

**What is Scroll Receipt?**
Scroll Receipt is a Chrome extension that turns your browser short-form video time into a daily receipt-style summary.

**Does it track phone apps?**
No. Browser activity only.

**Is data private?**
Yes. By default everything stays on device. Email sync sends only daily totals, not URLs or titles.

**When do email receipts arrive?**
Default 00:05 local time for the previous day (configurable after email verification).
